form.formComment: Resuming after a six-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation fifth of 15 at Redcar in the LR Two-Year-Old Trophy October 4 over 1200m, 2.25 len behind Ardisia carrying 58kg at $2.80. On debut second last of 7 at Goodwood June 8 over 1200m, soft track; 8 len behind Jel Pepper carrying 60.5kg at $7.50. Form shown last campaign makes for good reading.

form.formComment: Resuming. Not seen since he finished last of 7 at Doncaster in the LR Doncaster Stakes October 25 over 1200m, in the wet; 15 len behind Lam Yai with 58.5kg at $3.30. On debut fourth of 10 at Chester June 14 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Calico Blue with 60.5kg at $12. Has ability but others rate better.

form.formComment: Resuming after a eight months break. Finished off last campaign fourth of 8 at York in the LR Roses Stakes August 23 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Revival Power carrying 58kg at $6.50. form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation third of 10 at Meydan January 30 over 1600m, 1.5 len behind Title Role with 58kg at $2.90. When resuming last campaign fourth of 14 at Meydan January 2 over 1400m, 2.5 len behind Northern Champion carrying 58kg at $4.40. Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Resuming after a six-and-a-half months break. At his first start won by 1.5 len York May 15 over 1200m defeating Side Deal carrying 59kg at $7. Among the better chances.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after seven months favourite; scored a big 5.5 len win at Wolverhampton March 30 over 1200m defeating The Jackal carrying 58.5kg at $1.70. Previously second-up 13th of 23 at Ascot in the LR Windsor Castle Stakes on June 18 over 1000m, 6 len behind Havana Hurricane with 59.5kg at $34. The one to beat based on that latest effort. Leading contender.
